metadata.name: London PDH-PDL Sweep Reversal
metadata.author: Quant_Lab_Alpha
metadata.rationale: Tests if London sweeping the Previous Day High or Low and printing a confirmed fractal acts as the high/low of the session.

long_trigger.comment: London sweeps PDL and forms a Fractal Low. Buy the reversal.

short_trigger.comment: London sweeps PDH and forms a Fractal High. Sell the reversal.
